Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Enum Class ContractConfigType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ContractConfigType>
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ContractConfigType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ContractConfigType>, Constable
public enum ContractConfigType extends Enum<ContractConfigType>

Java class for ContractConfigType

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <simpleType name="ContractConfigType">
   <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string">
     <enumeration value="ContractDocumentDownloadOption"/>
     <enumeration value="WordTrackChangesDisplayColor"/>
     <enumeration value="InclWordTrackChgReconciliation"/>
     <enumeration value="InclWordTrackChgSectionContent"/>
     <enumeration value="CreateDocSectionsDocxTemplates"/>
     <enumeration value="AutoGenDocOnContractCreation"/>
     <enumeration value="AutoGenerateDocFileType"/>
     <enumeration value="ContractSignedStatus"/>
     <enumeration value="ContractSignatureDeclinedSts"/>
     <enumeration value="NotifyDocTemplateVerChgStatus"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignUseAccountDefaultNtfcn"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignReminderEnabled"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignReminderDelayinDays"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignReminderFrequency"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignExpireEnabled"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignExpiresAfter"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignExpireWarning"/>
     <enumeration value="DocuSignAccountBrand"/>
     <enumeration value="Append0ToAutoNbrEmbeddedSect"/>
     <enumeration value="DocumentFileNameFormat"/>
     <enumeration value="DefaultTemplateName"/>
     <enumeration value="AutoGenDocOnContractUpdate"/>
     <enumeration value="ContractSignatureVoidedStatus"/>
     <enumeration value="ContractSignatureExpiredStatus"/>
     <enumeration value="TrackContractRedlines"/>
     <enumeration value="DocumentTemplateFilterClass"/>
     <enumeration value="EmailNotificationOnDocumentGeneration"/>
     <enumeration value="ImportTargetContractStatus"/>
   </restriction>
 </simpleType>
